limitations: PostgreSQL GiST exclusion constraints require validation against the isolated staging PostgreSQL service.

results.name: Organization and tenant boundaries
results.detail: Agency, developer, and hotel tenants created with isolated owners

results.detail: Four messages persisted with both users as participants

results.name: Inspection workflow
results.detail: Confirmed inspection completed with labelled QA feedback

results.detail: Available, reserved, and sold inventory states persisted

results.detail: Lead, four-message thread, payment-plan request, inspection, and unchanged inventory persisted

results.detail: Reservation persisted and overlap guard query detected the occupied range

results.name: Database double-booking constraint
results.detail: Constraint is present in production migration; pg-mem cannot execute PostgreSQL GiST exclusion constraints

results.name: Guest and hotel messaging
results.detail: Reservation lead and four-message guest thread persisted

results.detail: Invitation acceptance, membership, assigned lead, and active pilot entitlement persisted

results.name: Marketing attribution and notifications
results.detail: Generated material retained its QR target and 13 notification events were captured locally

results.detail: Approve, revise, reject, report, suspend, reinstate, and audit states persisted

results.detail: Agency-scoped query cannot match the hotel tenant
